page_content:
Formerly: BUMK758H.

BUMK764 Business Communications II (1 Credit)

Teaches students how to communicate quantitative information effectively. Focuses on developing written, spoken and presentation skills.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. BUMK758G or BUMK764.
